title: The Light Disappears Above
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Usopp. The core story beat is the light disappears above.
scene: The scene centers on the light disappears above, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Usopp driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How far down d'you think we've come?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The light from the surface is barely even reaching us any more...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're way past the "sunlit stratum"... and coming to the end of the "Twlight stratum", I'd say.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We must be over a 1000 down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so quiet... this feels completely different from being in a submarine. It's almost like flying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... it's old man white- &, beard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be so easy to smash their ship to pieces an' turn the lot of 'em into sea junk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But that ain't good enough... nobody'd be able to tell it was us that did it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, we're gonna slit their throats an' take the bodies back with us!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: The world is gonna hear the name of Caribou!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're not prepared for battle in the slightest... this is a perfect ambush!! Don't you let me down, meeen!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's something approaching from six- o'clock!! A sea mon-ster...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, guys!!! There's something coming from behind - looks like a ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're ramming up alongside our ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get away from Theeem!!! The bubble's gonna break aak!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Don't tell me they're coming up bubble-to-bubble to board our ship....?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: .....?!! Hang on a minute... is that......?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're mohmoo, from the Arlong Pirates, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was with the fishmen, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? We've seen this guy before, right, Luffy?

summary: The Light Disappears Above. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
